mapper.select: select * from classBBS where cStatus = 1 order by cNum desc
mapper.update: update classBBS set cTeacher = #{cTeacher}, cCategory = #{cCategory}, cTitle = #{cTitle}, cContent = #{cContent}, cPrice = #{cPrice}, cDelivery = #{cDelivery}, cMaxStu = #{cMaxStu}, cArea = #{cArea}, cOnoff = #{cOnoff} where cNum = #{cNum}
update classBBS set cStatus = #{status} where cNum = #{cNum}
update classBBS set cLikes = cLikes + 1 where cNum = #{cNum}
mapper.select: select exists(select 1 from classLikes where uId = #{uId} and cNum = #{cNum})
mapper.update: update classBBS set cApplyStu = cApplyStu + #{amount} where cNum = #{cNum}
